conversion_steps: 1. Extract Tile X, Y, and Zoom from image filename (e.g., 16816-29821-16)
2. Calculate Tile Bounding Box in WGS84 using Lon/Lat to XYZ inverse
3. Map GeoJSON Polygon vertices to pixel coordinates within the 256x256 tile
4. Calculate pixel-space bounding box (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)
5. Normalize coordinates relative to image dimensions: center_x/W, center_y/H, width/W, height/H
